title: End Sem Exam Schedule for 1st to 4th Year
description: The end semester examination for Odd Semester 2025-26 will commence from 23 Dec 2025 to 31 Jan 2026. All students are requested to check the detailed schedule on the university portal.

title: AKTU Result Portal Open
description: Results for previous semester examinations are now available on the AKTU result portal. Check your grades using your roll number.

title: New PYQs Added — 3rd Year CS Subjects
description: We've added 2024-25 AKTU PYQs for BCS501, BCS502, and BCS503. Browse 3rd year resources to access them.
